steps.title: Compare the slopes of both lines
steps.content:
Both equations are in slope-intercept form $y = mx + b$.

Line 1: $y = 5x + 10$ has slope $m = 5$
Line 2: $y = 5x - 2$ has slope $m = 5$

Both lines have the same slope but different y-intercepts (10 and -2, respectively).

steps.title: Parallel lines never intersect
steps.content: When two lines have the same slope and different y-intercepts, they are parallel. Parallel lines never intersect in the coordinate plane. Therefore, the graphs meet at zero points. That matches choice A — A is correct.
